text:
(1) A person commits the offense of failure to submit an odometer disclosure if the person is required by ORS 803.102 (Odometer disclosure statement upon transfer of interest) , 803.370 (Contents of application) , 805.120 (Effect of fleet registration) or 815.415 (Unlawful repair of odometer) to submit an odometer disclosure and the person fails to submit the required odometer disclosure.

(2) The offense described in this section, failure to submit an odometer disclosure, is a Class C misdemeanor. [1985 c.251 §6; 1989 c.148 §18; 1991 c.67 §223; 1991 c.873 §20; 1993 c.751 §108]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.425 — Failure to submit odometer disclosure

(1) A person commits the offense of failure to submit an odometer disclosure if the person is required by ORS 803.102 (Odometer disclosure statement upon transfer of interest) , 803.370 (Contents of application) , 805.120 (Effect of fleet registration) or 815.415 (Unlawful repair of odometer) to submit an odometer disclosure and the person fails to submit the required odometer disclosure.

(2) The offense described in this section, failure to submit an odometer disclosure, is a Class C misdemeanor. [1985 c.251 §6; 1989 c.148 §18; 1991 c.67 §223; 1991 c.873 §20; 1993 c.751 §108]

The offense described in this section, failure to submit an odometer disclosure, is a Class C misdemeanor. [1985 c.251 §6; 1989 c.148 §18; 1991 c.67 §223; 1991 c.873 §20; 1993 c.751 §108]
